code-reviewer.description: Reviews code for best practices and potential issues

architect.description: Designs the overall architecture of the application

error-build-fixer.description: Handles build errors and provides fixes. Use when there are build errors in the project.

security-auditor.description: Audits code for security vulnerabilities and provides recommendations. Use when there is user input, sensitive data handling, or authentication/authorization logic in the project.

terraform-specialist.description: Creates and optimizes Terraform configurations. Use when there is infrastructure as code or cloud resource management in the project.

tdd-developer.description: Writes tests before implementation code. Use when there is a need for high test coverage and maintainable code.

aws-infra-engineer.description: Designs and implements AWS infrastructure. Use when the project involves deploying applications on AWS or managing AWS resources.

pipeline-specialist.description: Designs and optimizes CI/CD pipelines. Use when there is a need for automated testing, building, and deployment in the project.

zinior-engineer.description: context manager. Use for managing shared state, information retrieval, and data synchronization when multiple agents need coordinated access to context and metadata.

orchestrator-agent.description: Coordinates the activities of all subagents, manages task assignments, and ensures smooth collaboration. Use to oversee the entire development process and facilitate communication between agents.
